title: engines.engine_chain_dispatched
description: T7:engines engine_chain_dispatched event payload (WS-310 Phase E). Emitted by cwos-engine-complete after engine_run_completed when the source engine declares chains.on_complete in registry.yaml. Each chained target gets one event + one priority-35 queue item. The chain is reactive (queue item, not synchronous engine invocation) so the founder or autopilot can choose to run it.

source_engine.description: engine_id whose run just completed and triggered the chain

source_event_id.description: id of the engine_run_completed event that triggered this dispatch

queue_item_id.description: WS-NNN created for the chained run, or null if creation was skipped

skipped.description: True when dispatch was suppressed by cycle-guard or missing target
